parts.text: I’m checking on my service contract and want to know the end date.
Can you help me understand my phone and internet coverage areas?
I have a contract question and need assistance without providing my account number.
I want to know your disconnection or policy rules but don’t have account info.
I’d like to see what my options are for renewing or changing contracts.
Can you help me with my contract status and coverage options?
I’m calling regarding my mobile internet plan; I don’t have my account number, but I want to know when it ends.
Can you provide details about my service agreement if I can’t find my account number?
I want to see what plans or contracts are available to me.
When does my contract expire, and what are my options?
I have questions about my contract terms and options for renewal.
Can you tell me about my phone coverage without my account number?
I want to check my network coverage for my area.
I need information about your policies, but I don’t know my account number.
I’m calling about my coverage and I don’t have the account info.
I want to know when my mobile contract ends.
How long is my current contract, and what options do I have?
Can you explain the details of my coverage zone?
I have some questions about my service agreement, but I don’t have my account number.
I need help understanding my contract terms.
Can you check my contract information if I provide my phone number?
I want to review my billing contract but I don’t have my account details.
I’m calling to check the amount left owing on my contract.
Can you tell me how much time is left on my contract?
I want to check information about my cell phone coverage, but I don’t have my account number.
